allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''/dev/stdin'',''utf8''\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); Object.values\(j.vulnerabilities||{}\).filter\(v=>v.severity===''high''||v.severity===''critical''\).forEach\(v=>console.log\(v.severity.toUpperCase\(\), v.name, v.via?.map?.\(x=>typeof x===''string''?x:x.title\).join\('', ''\)\)\)")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Service | Where-Object {$_Name -like ''*mysql*'' -or $_DisplayName -like ''*mysql*''} | Select-Object Name, DisplayName, Status")
Bash(mysql -u root -P 3306 -e "SELECT user, plugin FROM mysql.user WHERE user=''root'';")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "Start-Process powershell -Verb RunAs -ArgumentList ''-NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command ""net stop MariaDB; Start-Sleep 3; net start MariaDB; Start-Sleep 2""'' -Wait")
Bash(mysql -u root -P 3306 -e "SELECT user, host, JSON_VALUE\(priv, ''$.plugin''\) AS plugin FROM mysql.global_priv WHERE user=''root'';")
